title: Length of longest consecutive ones
hints: Count the total number of 1's in the string.
If all characters are 1's, return the length of the string.
For each 0, count consecutive 1's on the left and right sides.
If left + right equals total ones, we can only get left+right (no extra 1 to swap).
Otherwise, we can get left+right+1 by swapping one 1 from elsewhere.
